regression_tests: manual UI check: Scan LAN action is hidden on web
root_cause: On Flutter Web, _scanForServers() called InternetAddress.anyIPv4 from dart:io, which is not available in the browser runtime. Fix added a kIsWeb guard that returns early with a status message instead of attempting LAN discovery. The Scan LAN button is also hidden on web.
notes: Platform macOS:web. No dedicated regression test added; the fix is guarded by the compile-time kIsWeb constant which is enforced by the Flutter web build toolchain.
